visuals.title: Page Replacement Algorithms
visuals.description: Animated visual showing FIFO, Optimal, and LRU page replacement algorithms with Belady anomaly and comparison table
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="420" data-topic-id="page-replacement">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="420" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- Group 1: Title -->
  <g data-narration="Page replacement algorithms decide which page to evict from memory when a new page must be loaded and no free frames exist." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Page Replacement Algorithms</text>
    <line x1="80" y1="30" x2="340" y2="30" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 2: FIFO -->
  <g data-narration="FIFO replaces the oldest page in memory. Pages 1, 2, 3 are loaded. When page 4 arrives, page 1 is evicted because it was loaded first." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="15" y="52" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">FIFO</text>
    <text x="55" y="52" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#3949AB">- First In, First Out</text>
    <!-- 3 frame slots -->
    <rect x="15" y="58" width="50" height="24" fill="#3949AB" rx="4"/>
    <text x="40" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">1</text>
    <rect x="70" y="58" width="50" height="24" fill="#3949AB" rx="4"/>
    <text x="95" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">2</text>
    <rect x="125" y="58" width="50" height="24" fill="#3949AB" rx="4"/>
    <text x="150" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">3</text>
    <!-- Arrow and new page -->
    <text x="190" y="74" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#3949AB">→</text>
    <rect x="210" y="58" width="32" height="24" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="226" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">4</text>
    <text x="250" y="74" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#555">arrives</text>
    <!-- Result: page 1 replaced -->
    <text x="300" y="64" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#C62828">→</text>
    <rect x="318" y="58" width="30" height="24" fill="#C62828" rx="4" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="333" y="74" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="white">1</text>
    <text x="354" y="74" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#C62828">out</text>
    <text x="15" y="96" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#555">Oldest page (1) is replaced. Simple queue order.</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 3: Optimal -->
  <g data-narration="The Optimal algorithm replaces the page that will not be used for the longest time in the future. It gives the fewest page faults but requires future knowledge, making it impractical." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="15" y="118" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Optimal</text>
    <text x="62" y="118" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#00695C">- Replace page not used for longest time</text>
    <!-- Frame slots with pages -->
    <rect x="15" y="124" width="50" height="24" fill="#00695C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="40" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">1</text>
    <rect x="70" y="124" width="50" height="24" fill="#00695C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="95" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">2</text>
    <rect x="125" y="124" width="50" height="24" fill="#00695C" rx="4"/>
    <text x="150" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">3</text>
    <!-- Arrow and new page -->
    <text x="190" y="140" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#00695C">→</text>
    <rect x="210" y="124" width="32" height="24" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="226" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">4</text>
    <!-- Future ref string -->
    <text x="250" y="132" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#555">Future: 2,1,2,...</text>
    <text x="250" y="142" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#555">3 used furthest</text>
    <!-- Result: page 3 replaced -->
    <text x="318" y="124" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#C62828">→</text>
    <rect x="336" y="124" width="30" height="24" fill="#C62828" rx="4"/>
    <text x="351" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="white">3</text>
    <text x="372" y="140" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#C62828">out</text>
    <text x="15" y="162" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#00695C" font-style="italic">Best possible result, but requires future knowledge (impractical).</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 4: LRU -->
  <g data-narration="LRU replaces the page that has not been used for the longest time in the past. It is a good practical approximation of the Optimal algorithm." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="15" y="184" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">LRU</text>
    <text x="40" y="184" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#E65100">- Least Recently Used</text>
    <!-- Reference string -->
    <text x="15" y="197" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#555">Ref string:</text>
    <text x="70" y="197" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" fill="#3949AB">1, 2, 3, 4, 1, 2</text>
    <!-- Frame slots with pages -->
    <rect x="15" y="202" width="50" height="24" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="40" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">1</text>
    <rect x="70" y="202" width="50" height="24" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="95" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">2</text>
    <rect x="125" y="202" width="50" height="24" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="150" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">3</text>
    <!-- Arrow and new page 4 -->
    <text x="190" y="218" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#E65100">→</text>
    <rect x="210" y="202" width="32" height="24" fill="#3949AB" rx="4"/>
    <text x="226" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="white">4</text>
    <!-- Past usage info -->
    <text x="250" y="210" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#555">Last used: 1 oldest</text>
    <text x="250" y="220" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#555">Replace page 1</text>
    <!-- Result -->
    <text x="318" y="202" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#C62828">→</text>
    <rect x="336" y="202" width="30" height="24" fill="#C62828" rx="4"/>
    <text x="351" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="white">1</text>
    <text x="372" y="218" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#C62828">out</text>
    <text x="15" y="240" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#E65100" font-style="italic">Good approximation of Optimal. Expensive to implement (needs timestamps/stack).</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 5: Belady's Anomaly -->
  <g data-narration="Belady's anomaly is a surprising behavior where FIFO can produce more page faults when given more memory frames. For example, with the reference string 1,2,3,4,1,2,5,1,2,3,4,5 FIFO gives 9 faults with 3 frames but 10 faults with 4 frames." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <rect x="10" y="250" width="400" height="72" fill="white" rx="6" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
    <text x="210" y="267" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Belady's Anomaly (FIFO only)</text>
    <text x="210" y="281" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#C62828">More frames can cause MORE page faults!</text>
    <!-- 3 frames counter -->
    <rect x="50" y="288" width="100" height="26" fill="#3949AB" rx="5"/>
    <text x="100" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="white">3 frames: 9 PF</text>
    <!-- vs -->
    <text x="175" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">vs</text>
    <!-- 4 frames counter -->
    <rect x="200" y="288" width="110" height="26" fill="#C62828" rx="5"/>
    <text x="255" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="11" fill="white">4 frames: 10 PF</text>
    <!-- Warning icon -->
    <text x="340" y="306" font-family="Arial" font-size="16" fill="#C62828">⚠</text>
    <text x="358" y="306" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#C62828">Anomaly!</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Group 6: Comparison Table -->
  <g data-narration="Comparison: FIFO is simple but suffers from Belady's anomaly. Optimal gives fewest page faults but is impractical since it needs future knowledge. LRU is a good practical choice but expensive to implement due to tracking recency." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Comparison</text>
    <!-- Header row -->
    <rect x="15" y="346" width="120" height="18" fill="#3949AB" rx="3"/>
    <text x="75" y="358" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Algorithm</text>
    <rect x="140" y="346" width="130" height="18" fill="#3949AB" rx="3"/>
    <text x="205" y="358" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Advantage</text>
    <rect x="275" y="346" width="130" height="18" fill="#3949AB" rx="3"/>
    <text x="340" y="358" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Disadvantage</text>
    <!-- FIFO row -->
    <rect x="15" y="366" width="120" height="16" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="75" y="377" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#3949AB" font-weight="bold">FIFO</text>
    <rect x="140" y="366" width="130" height="16" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="205" y="377" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#333">Simple to implement</text>
    <rect x="275" y="366" width="130" height="16" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="340" y="377" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">Belady's anomaly</text>
    <!-- Optimal row -->
    <rect x="15" y="383" width="120" height="16" fill="white" rx="2"/>
    <text x="75" y="394" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Optimal</text>
    <rect x="140" y="383" width="130" height="16" fill="white" rx="2"/>
    <text x="205" y="394" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#333">Fewest page faults</text>
    <rect x="275" y="383" width="130" height="16" fill="white" rx="2"/>
    <text x="340" y="394" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">Needs future knowledge</text>
    <!-- LRU row -->
    <rect x="15" y="400" width="120" height="16" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="75" y="411" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">LRU</text>
    <rect x="140" y="400" width="130" height="16" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="205" y="411" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#333">Good approximation</text>
    <rect x="275" y="400" width="130" height="16" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="340" y="411" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">Expensive to implement</text>
  </g>
</svg>
